subcodes.first_line: Praise befits and is meet for the Lord of Eternity, Who alone through His Pen hath conquered the world and its peoples, detached from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که بقلم وحده عالم و امم را تسخیر نمود و منقطعا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @suffering and imprisonment, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
